detail.description:
"You don't see them... but they see you.

You’re an orphan, raised by a wandering feng shui master who found you near a graveyard. Before he died, he handed you a locked box—the only clue to your past. After burying him, you begin your journey to uncover the truth.
Your first lead brings you to a run-down apartment building. You move in as a tenant—but something is deeply wrong.
- The elevator opens by itself—on floors no one pressed.
- An empty unit echoes with whispers that don’t exist.
- A cu
